content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt explicitly calls the submission a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), which is beta/unfinished language on store-facing copy.
Pierre: Apple explicitly requires that App Store builds be final, not beta/test versions — TestFlight exists for that purpose, and this text signals to reviewers the build may be unfinished, risking a 2.2/2.1 rejection. Rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature as a normal, finished update (e.g. "Improved sync reliability") without "beta," "testing," or "rough edges" language. Verify the actual sync feature is stable/complete before resubmitting.
